mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT @ROWNUM := @ROWNUM + 1 AS ROWNUM, TMP.* FROM (SELECT * FROM BOARD_BLOG WHERE CATEGORY LIKE '%${category}%' AND TITLE LIKE '%${query}%' )TMP , (SELECT(@ROWNUM :=0)=0)TMP2 ORDER BY CREATE_DATE DESC)TMP3 WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN ${start} AND ${end};
SELECT COUNT(*)AS COUNT FROM BOARD_BLOG WHERE CATEGORY LIKE '%${category}%' AND TITLE LIKE '%${query}%';
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD_BLOG SET COUNT = 1+ COUNT WHERE NUM = ${id};
UPDATE BOARD_BLOG SET COMMENT = 1+ COMMENT WHERE NUM = ${id};
UPDATE BOARD_BLOG SET COMMENT = COMMENT - 1 WHERE NUM = ${id};
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM BOARD_BLOG ORDER BY COUNT DESC LIMIT 5;
